content: next-intl middleware locale detection order: (1) locale prefix in URL; (2) NEXT_LOCALE cookie; (3) Accept-Language header; (4) defaultLocale. localePrefix 'always' puts prefix on all locales including default. Cookie: {name:'NEXT_LOCALE', maxAge:60*60*24*365}. Custom geo-detect: compose custom middleware function before createMiddleware to inject defaultLocale from request headers (CF-IPCountry etc). For BFF-based geo: client-side after config load (middleware cannot call BFF). localeDetection:false disables auto-detection.
